Off Calendar May-12-2026 Continued To Jun-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cherlene L. Usher for successor administrator Pamela D. Pujo (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on 1) First Report and Account of Successor Administrator; and 2) Report of Status.

Ms. Usher reported that administration of the estate remained dependent on resolution of the related estates of decedent's husband and mother-in-law. She anticipated that the husband's estate would not be resolved until 2026 because tax returns from 2025 would need to be filed before distribution to the present estate could occur.

Following discussion, the Court took the underlying petitions off calendar and set a new hearing for Status on Close of Estate for May 12, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Charlene Usher appeared via zoom for Pamela Pujo (successor administrator).

Discussion was held regarding Susie's deceased brother Mark Baysinger, that he may have two children, that his probate estate would be in San Francisco, and that if Mr. Emeziem has a will to lodge it with the Court by August 18, 2025.

The Report of Status of Administration is continued to October 20, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

First Report and Account of Successor Administrator is continued to October 20, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Final Account Of Administration Of Deceased Personal Representative
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Final Account Of Administration Of Deceased Personal Representative
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Continued To Sep-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-19-303172 Estate of Michael Adolff Jones and
PES-19-303215 Estate of Susie Baysanger Jones.

Appearances: Charlene Usher appeared by zoom for Pamela Pujo.

Mrs. Usher stated that her client will not be filing waivers of accounting, that they are finalizing their accounting and that they plan on filing it within the next week or so. Mrs. Usher also stated that Suzie's estate cannot be finalized until Michael's estate is finalized, that Michael has a 50% interest in a property along with the mother and that they intend to list and sell the property. In addition, Mrs. Usher stated that there are tenants in the property and will be going through the unlawful detainer process, that the property may not be sold until 2025 and that they will have to wait until 2026 to file the final tax returns. The status hearings regarding final account of administration of deceased personal representative in both cases are continued to September 18, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Final Account Of Administration Of Deceased Personal Representative
Off Calendar Mar-20-2024 Continued To Aug-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PES-19-303172 The Estate of Michael Adolff Jones and PES-19-303215 The Estate of Susie Baysanger Jones.

Appearances: Charlene Usher appeared via zoom for Pamela Pujo (petitioner).
Debbie Jones appeared via zoom for Alliance Research.

Discussion was held regarding property, that it needs to be sold but having issues with squatters, that an unlawful detainer is to be executed, and that they will need an additional 6 months because they found additional assets. Both matters are continued to August 21, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PES-19-303172 The Estate of Michael Adolff Jones and PES-19-303215 The Estate of Susie Baysanger Jones.

Appearances: Charlene Usher appeared via zoom for and with Pamela Pujo (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Pamela D. Pujo is appointed as the Successor Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $200,00.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for February 11, 205 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Status hearing re: final account of administration of estate etc., is continued to March 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Visiting Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Continued To Jan-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PES-19-303172 Estate of Michael Jones and PES-19-303215 Estate of Susie Jones.

Appearances: Charlene Usher appeared via zoom for and with Pamela Pujo (petitioner).

Ms. Usher confirmed that Mark Baysanger passed away sometime around April of 2022, that her client needs to be appointed as administrator, and that she will work on cleaning up all the issues and filing a final accounting in each estate. All matters are continued to January 10, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. File papers two weeks before on December 27 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Puliego: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Final Account Of Administration Of Deceased Personal Representative
Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Continued To Sep-19-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-19-303172 Estate of Michael Jones and PES-19-303215 Estate of Susie Jones.

Appearances: Charlene Usher appearing via zoom for and with Pamela Pujo (administrator).
Laura Peebles appearing via zoom for Ida Jones (Deceased administrator).

Discussion was held regarding previous administrator Ida Jones did not sign the inventory and appraisal, that Ms. Ushers client to file a final accounting, that Mrs. Peebles to provide the documents from previous administrator to assist Ms. Usher with her filings to the Court. Status hearing re final account of administration of deceased personal representative are both continued to September 19, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by September 05, 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrera. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Final Account Of Administration Of Deceased Personal Representative
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Continued To Aug-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-19-303172 Estate of Michael Adolff Jones and
PES-19-303215 Estate of Susie Baysanger Jones.

Appearances: Pamela Pujo (personal representative for the estate of Ida Mae Jones) appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The court noted that Mrs. Usher was not present. Mrs. Pujo stated that she does not know what happened to Mrs. Usher. Mrs. Pujo also stated that she will do the final accountings, but she is waiting for the final letters appointing her in Ida's estate. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Charlene L. Usher to appear on August 8, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear. An order to show cause re sanctions is also being issued for the same date for Charlene L. Usher to appear and show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear. Status re final accounting of administrator of deceased personal representative are also continued to August 8, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed Mrs. Pujo that the letters have not been issued, that her attorney needs to submit the letters, that they need to file petitions for appointment of a successor personal representative in these estates, and that the final accountings need to be filed.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Deceased Administrator'S Estate
Off Calendar Apr-20-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Deceased Administrator'S Estate
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Continued To Apr-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-12-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Peebles, via Zoom, for Ida Mae Jones, Personal Representative.

Ms. Peebles reports that she was advised of her client's death a few months ago and accordingly attempted to refer the related Estate matters to the Public Administrator offices of San Francisco and San Mateo Counties who both declined. Ms. Peebles reports that she is unaware of any next-of-kin but that it is her understanding that a relative named Pam Pujo intends to open a probate for Ms. Jones and that Ms. Pujo is considering hiring counsel to assist her. The court asks Ms. Peebles to file formal declarations regarding the above in the related Estate matters. The court advises that in light of Ms. Peebles' report, it intends to take the related petitions off calendar and set a status of probate for the appointment of a Personal Representative of Ida Mae Jones' estate for them to be ordered to file a final account of the deceased Administrator. No objections to the court's tentative ruling are presented.

The petition is taken off calendar. A Status on the opening of deceased Administrator's Estate is set for Mar-13-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Ms. Peebles is instructed to notify Ms. Pujo regarding the upcoming Status hearing date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
